texto: I'm so much more scared of white guys than black guys. Like an angry black guys would pull out a gun and be like 'Yo, I'm coming back with my cousins and we're gonna funck you up' and a white guy would be like just 'BANG'!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jeremy Iversen: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “I'm so much more scared of white guys than black guys. Like an angry black guys would pull out a …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, drama, undercover pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de humor e undercover.
